phases.name: Foundation
phases.notes: Build foundational movement quality. Master the clean, hinge, and squat before adding load.

phases.name: Progression
phases.notes: Add explosive contrast movements (jumps, broad jumps) and more complex patterns.

exercises.name: KB Clean to Goblet Squat with Halo

cues: Clean → squat → circle bell around head (halo)
Abs braced during halo; don't arch lower back
Standard pushup → tap opposite shoulder at top
After 2 standard: transition to yoga pushup variation with same taps
Regression: from knees
Bell outside foot; narrow stance; pistol-style grip
Core works double to resist rotation
Regression: suitcase deadlift to reduce momentum
Choose hollow hold level (1–3); bell straight overhead
Lower bell slightly behind head with straight arms
Low back must stay pressed into floor throughout
Regression: row hold for 40 seconds

Progression: pause at bottom or slow eccentric
Regression: floor press or hip-thrust bench variation
